chat_messages.content: I just don't know how to keep going. I lost her three weeks ago and the apartment is still full of her things. I keep finding her hair on the pillow. I don't know what to do.

targets.label: A blunt and philosophical wandering traveler
targets.rationale: A Sagittarian explorer who reacts to the stillness with big-picture curiosity.

targets.label: A sensitive and sentimental homebody
targets.rationale: A Cancerian profile that feels the heavy atmosphere of the empty apartment.

targets.label: A street-smart, chatty observer
targets.rationale: Using colloquial language to navigate a potentially trope-heavy setting.

targets.label: An authoritative guide giving instructions
targets.rationale: A persona that moves from observation to prescribing how the scene should proceed.
